free_text: The Pr6O11 target thickness was 5 to 11 mg/cm2, the
diameter was 20 mm, and the content of dinitrocellulose
was 1% to 3%. The targets were covered by a thin Al
foil (8.3+ - 0.5 mu-m) to avoid mechanical damage.
ORTEC GEM 35P4 HPGe detector with energy

The measured excitation functions were compared
with the data from TENDL-2021 library.
Entry was approved by Dr. E.S.Kormazeva.
